title: QP IMP Certification: Evidence to Check
alt: Checklist of evidence a QP reviews before certifying an IMP batch

items.label: Product specification file
items.desc: Batch aligns with the dossier and clinical trial authorisation

items.label: GMP site compliance
items.desc: Produced under a valid MIA(IMP) to GMP principles

items.label: Batch documentation
items.desc: Records, in-process controls and CoA reviewed

items.label: Deviations & changes
items.desc: Departures assessed for impact on quality and the trial

items.label: Clinical labelling
items.desc: Annex 13 expiry, storage and trial details correct
